subject: Re:
body:
but what are you doing ,, and then what?


----- Original Message ----
From: Cecilia Steen <cecilia.steen@gmail.com>
To: JE <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Sunday, June 10, 2007 9:53:05 AM
Subject: 


Hallo JE!
Turned 34 celebrating w/ friends, Lebanese food, and 105 F.
 
I'll be w/ Siraj Capital until end of Aug.
 
The downside with dating one of the most eligible bachelors in the GCC is that... well, he's eligible! I learned the hard way that everyone and their mother will come after him. So I try to live by the rule of focusing on my happiness and life. 

I hope you're well,
-- 
Cecilia Steen
Dubai Mobile +971 50 940 2062
